checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds the contracted specbridge-final-standardization-status command, wired into scripts/specbridge.ps1, implemented in scripts/lib/standard-completion.ps1, documented in docs/specbridge-final-standardization-status.md and README.md, and covered by CLI tests.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command reports readiness, repository health, standardization_completion_pct=95, remaining_standardization_pct=5, categorized remaining_gaps, blocked_boundaries, recommended_next_contracts, validation_expectations, evidence sources, and false mutation/runtime/deployment boundaries. OutputPath is restricted to .specbridge/standard-readiness/final-standardization.status.json and requires Force for replacement.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: No branch cleanup, artifact cleanup, retention enforcement, mutation-capable MCP, hosted/network runtime, GitHub mutation inside the command, dependency installation, workflow security change, production change, secret access, billing, auth, database, or deployment work occurred.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command sets launches_claude=false, launches_codex=false, calls_network=false, mutates_github=false, reads_secrets=false, changes_billing=false, changes_ci_cd_security=false, deploys=false, cleanup_permission=none, and retention_enforcement=none.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files are declared in the issue-252 scope manifest exclusive_write list after adding ledger and dashboard evidence.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: validate-contracts, validate-contract-scopes, test-specbridge-cli, specbridge-smoke, validate-final-reports, validate-audit-packets, validate-chatgpt-audits, specbridge-doctor, specbridge-final-standardization-status, and git diff --check passed locally. Doctor is healthy with 0 warnings and 0 blockers after ledger and dashboard evidence refresh.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local smoke passed. GitHub PR #253 checks passed: claude-review, validate-foundation, generate-pr-review-report, and review-gate.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report marks completion_status=ready_for_human_merge, records GitHub CI as passed, records agent-side merge as blocked by .claude/rules/specbridge-autonomous-execution.md, and lists unresolved policy-gated future work instead of claiming cleanup, retention, MCP mutation, hosted runtime, or serious pilot execution are complete.

findings.evidence: Claude Code was invoked. The first attempt was blocked by the Claude permission layer, and the second attempt produced the initial command/tests/docs patch before session limit. Codex completed hardening and validation.
findings.recommendation: If future tasks require uninterrupted Claude Code writes, add a dedicated contract for Claude permission automation rather than broadening settings inside unrelated work.

findings.evidence: The command records 95 percent complete, 5 percent remaining, and five categorized remaining gaps: serious_pilot, repository_hygiene, artifact_hygiene, mcp_runtime, hosted_runtime.
findings.recommendation: Use serious-product-build-pilot as the next governed task after PR merge.

findings.evidence: GitHub PR #253 is mergeable and checks passed, but repository rules explicitly forbid agents from merging PRs.
findings.recommendation: Have the human/operator merge PR #253, then run the normal post-merge memory closure contract.

unresolved_risks: Agent-side merge is blocked by repository policy even though CI passed.
Remaining future work is policy-gated or pilot-gated and requires dedicated contracts.
